overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character leaving a dimly lit apartment bathroom, walking through a rainy neon-lit futuristic city street, and entering a crowded nightclub with holographic advertisements and lounge areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment bathroom with glass shower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit bathroom toward a glass shower enclosure at the far end

entered.detail: frosted glass shower stall with metallic frame and glowing edges
bright red towels hanging on wall hooks
dark countertop with sink and toiletries
large rectangular mirror above the vanity

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow, dimly lit futuristic bathroom with warm artificial lighting. The camera moves forward past red towels hanging on the left wall toward a glass shower enclosure at the far end, with a vanity and mirror visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy futuristic city street with neon-lit buildings

events.description: exits indoor bathroom into open rainy city street with neon lighting
ambient lighting shifts from warm indoor to cool blue neon outdoor

agents.ego_description: walking along a wet pavement past modern glass buildings with palm trees visible

entered.detail: tall building with reflective glass facade and horizontal neon strips
glowing cyan neon light strips running along building overhangs
textured palm tree trunk with wrapped lighting
rain-soaked street surface reflecting neon lights
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions abruptly to a rainy night in a futuristic city. The camera walks along wet pavement reflecting cyan neon lights from overhead strips on modern glass buildings. Palm trees line the walkway as the character approaches a building entrance with glass doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale nightclub lobby and bar with holographic advertisements

events.description: enters nightclub through automatic glass doors from the rainy street
slows pace and pans to observe the bar interior and holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through the nightclub entrance and exploring the interior lounge areas, passing by patrons and bar counters

notable_agents.action: group of patrons standing and conversing near the entrance area
bartender standing behind the counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: automatic sliding glass doors with metallic frames leading into the club
modern L-shaped sectional sofas with low tables in the lounge area
large illuminated billboard displaying 'Abydos King Size' beer advertisement with holographic woman
long dark bar counter with stools and bottles visible behind
suspended digital menu boards with glowing text
decorative tree in planter near the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sophisticated nightclub from the rain, passing through glass doors into a dimly lit interior with scattered patrons. The space features modern lounge seating, a long bar counter, and prominent holographic advertisements including a large 'Abydos' beer billboard. The camera moves through the crowd, observing the neon-lit interior and bar area before approaching the counter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate confines of a private residence into the rainy streets of a futuristic city and finally into a vibrant nightclub. It begins in a narrow, dimly lit bathroom, moving past red towels and a vanity toward a glass shower enclosure. The scene then shifts abruptly to a rainy night, where the camera walks along wet pavement reflecting cyan neon lights from glass buildings and palm trees before approaching a set of glass doors. As the character enters the building, the rainy exterior gives way to a sophisticated, dimly lit interior filled with scattered patrons and modern lounge seating. The camera finally glides through the crowd past a large holographic Abydos beer billboard, moving toward a long, neon-lit bar counter.
